name: Lavell Crawford
bio: Lavell Crawford is an American stand-up comedian and actor from St. Louis whose comedy mines his size, his family, and everyday Black life with high-energy delivery. He came up through BET's ComicView and reached a national audience as a runner-up on NBC's Last Comic Standing. He is widely recognized for playing the bodyguard Huell Babineaux in Breaking Bad and Better Call Saul, and his 2021 special The Comedy Vaccine earned a Grammy nomination.

timeline.ev: Finishes runner-up on NBC's Last Comic Standing
Records the special Can a Brother Get Some Love and joins Breaking Bad as Huell
Reprises Huell Babineaux on Better Call Saul
Releases the special Thee Lavell Crawford

accolades: Grammy nomination for Best Comedy Album for the album of The Comedy Vaccine (2021)
Runner-up on NBC's Last Comic Standing (2007)
Recurring role as Huell Babineaux in Breaking Bad and Better Call Saul

specials.t: Can a Brother Get Some Love?
